message.content:
Explore the codebase at D:\ll thoroughly. Find and read ALL source files. I need:
1. Directory listing of D:\ll
2. Full contents of main.js (or equivalent main process file)
3. Full contents of renderer.js (or equivalent renderer file)
4. Full contents of index.html
5. Full contents of package.json
6. Any data files like regulations.json
7. Any CSS/style files
8. Any other JS files

Read every source file completely. This is an Electron desktop app for multi-language video learning.

content.text: Claude Sonnet 4.5 is no longer available. Please switch to Claude Sonnet 4.6.
